title: Fit for Life: Dare to Dream
original_title: Fit for Life - Dare to Dream
overview: At 82 years old, Jack Lowe attempts an extraordinary challenge: cycling 11 classic Tour de France cols in 7 days, finishing on the iconic Alpe d'Huez. Joined by marathoner Jiggs Barasara (50 years), who faces the Alps for the first time, their journey becomes a powerful story of resilience, courage, and camaraderie.
